steps.title: Write the ticket prices
steps.content: The variable $x$ is the price during the event. The price before the event is $4$ dollars more, so it is $x+4$.

steps.title: Build the revenue expression
steps.content:
Revenue from at least $150$ before-event tickets and at least $210$ during-event tickets is represented by
$$
150(x+4)+210x
$$

steps.title: Use the minimum total
steps.content: The phrase at least means the revenue must be greater than or equal to $5{,}970$: $$ 150(x+4)+210x\ge 5{,}970 $$ The answer is B.
